subject: First Aid & Safety
title: Fatigue and Safety
description: Learn Fatigue and Safety in one minute.

hook.text: Working 17 hours straight impairs you as much as a blood alcohol level of 0.05%. Legally impaired.

buildup.text: Fatigue slows reaction time, impairs judgment, and reduces awareness of hazards.

discovery.text: Night shift workers have 30% more workplace injuries than day shift workers.

twist.text: The Chernobyl disaster, Exxon Valdez spill, and Challenger explosion all involved fatigued workers.

climax.text: Mandatory rest periods and shift limits are now standard in aviation, trucking, and healthcare.

punchline.text: Tired workers don't just make mistakes. They make catastrophes.

quiz.question: How does 17 hours without sleep affect impairment?
